args.code:
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

opportunities = locals()['var_function-call-3370700928885125514']
contracts = locals()['var_function-call-10688969095536139455']

df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities)
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contracts)

df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_contracts['Id'] = df_contracts['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df_opportunities = df_opportunities[df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].notna()]

df_merged = pd.merge(df_opportunities, df_contracts, left_on='ContractID__c', right_on='Id', how='inner')

# Convert date columns to datetime objects
df_merged['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CreatedDate'].str.split('T').str[0])
df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CompanySignedDate'])

# Calculate turnaround time
df_merged['TurnaroundTime'] = (df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] - df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.days

# Group by OwnerId and calculate average turnaround time
df_avg_turnaround = df_merged.groupby('OwnerId')['TurnaroundTime'].mean().reset_index()

# Find the agent with the quickest average turnaround
quickest_agent = df_avg_turnaround.loc[df_avg_turnaround['TurnaroundTime'].idxmin()]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(pd.Series(quickest_agent['OwnerId']).to_json())

import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

opportunities = locals()['var_function-call-3370700928885125514']
contracts = locals()['var_function-call-10688969095536139455']

df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities)
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contracts)

df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_contracts['Id'] = df_contracts['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

df_opportunities = df_opportunities[df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].notna()]

df_merged = pd.merge(df_opportunities, df_contracts, left_on='ContractID__c', right_on='Id', how='inner')

# Convert date columns to datetime objects
df_merged['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CreatedDate'].str.split('T').str[0])
df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_merged['CompanySignedDate'])

# Calculate turnaround time
df_merged['TurnaroundTime'] = (df_merged['CompanySignedDate'] - df_merged['CreatedDate']).dt.days

# Group by OwnerId and calculate average turnaround time
df_avg_turnaround = df_merged.groupby('OwnerId')['TurnaroundTime'].mean().reset_index()

# Find the agent with the quickest average turnaround
quickest_agent = df_avg_turnaround.loc[df_avg_turnaround['TurnaroundTime'].idxmin()]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(pd.Series(quickest_agent['OwnerId']).to_json())
